summary: Iteration 65 - Casting Agency Features Testing. Backend API tests: ALL 7 PASSED. Frontend: Blocked by persistent donation popup overlay. Name generation bug FIXED - recruits now have proper Italian/international names (e.g., 'Marco Esposito', 'Julia Pereira').

issues: Donation popup appears frequently and blocks UI interactions. Must dismiss with Escape key. This popup has high z-index (z-[100]) and intercepts clicks on infrastructure cards.

backend.GET /api/production-studio/casting: PASS - Returns 4 recruits with proper names: Marco Esposito (Italy), Julia Pereira (Brazil), Christophe Durand (France), Arjun Reddy (India)
backend.POST /api/production-studio/casting/hire: PASS - Successfully hires recruit to personal cast
PASS - Successfully sends recruit to cinema school with pre-existing skills
PASS - Returns 400 error 'Hai già ingaggiato questo talento questa settimana' when trying to hire same recruit twice
backend.POST /api/cast/search-advanced: PASS - Correctly filters cast by player level (max_stars = 1 + level/10) and fame (max_fame = fame + 30)
backend.GET /api/cast/available: PASS - Correctly filters all cast types (actors, directors, screenwriters, composers) by level/fame
backend.Recruit name format: PASS - All names follow 'FirstName LastName' pattern with nationality-appropriate names

frontend.Infrastructure page: PASS - Loads correctly, shows 4 user infrastructures
frontend.Production Studio card visible: PASS - Card visible in 'Le Mie Infrastrutture' section
frontend.Production Studio Panel: BLOCKED - Donation popup intercepts clicks, cannot open dialog
frontend.Casting Agency tab: NOT TESTED - Blocked by donation popup
frontend.Recruit popup: NOT TESTED - Blocked by donation popup

action_items: Consider reducing donation popup frequency or adding a 'Don't show again' option
Add data-testid to infrastructure cards for easier automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Name generation bug FIXED: Code now uses f'first_{gender}' correctly to access NAMES_BY_NATIONALITY keys (lines 9673, 9732)
Hire endpoint correctly validates recruit exists in weekly pool before processing
Cast filtering correctly implements max_stars = min(5, 1 + level // 10) and max_fame = min(100, fame + 30)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend casting features all working. Name generation bug is FIXED - names like 'Marco Esposito', 'Julia Pereira' instead of 'Unknown'. Donation popup frequently blocks UI testing - need to close with Escape key multiple times before interacting with UI elements. Consider testing with popup closed via browser console if needed.

verified_features.Name Generation Fix: VERIFIED - Recruits have proper names matching their nationality
verified_features.Hire to Personal Cast: VERIFIED via API - Creates cast_pool entry with is_personal_cast=true
verified_features.Send to School: VERIFIED via API - Creates student with pre-existing skills based on recruit skill level
verified_features.Double-Hire Prevention: VERIFIED - Returns 400 error on second attempt in same week
verified_features.Cast Level/Fame Filtering: VERIFIED - Both search-advanced and available endpoints filter correctly
